headline: Trump 🍊👑 BLUSTERS BUSTED 🤡💥 Iran 🟡🤝 TALKS OR BUST 🛑💣
text: Trump 🍊👑 on Iran 🟡: 'They're SCUM 🗑️🤮 SICK 💉😵 VICIOUS 💀🔪 led by SICK 💉😵 people! Nuke 🧨☢️ they'd USE IT 💥😤 it's OVER 💀🚫!' But later he SWERVES 🤷‍♂️💫 from VICTORY 🍾🏆 to ANNIHILATE 🧨☠️ Iranian CIVILISATION 🏛️🔥 then BACKS TALKS 🗣️🤝. 'We'll HIT HARDER 💥💪 TONIGHT 🌙🔥 I gave WARNING 🚨👀!' US 🇺🇸 can SMASH 🥊💥 Iran 🟡 but CAN'T BREAK 🦴💔 regime WILL 🧠🛡️ to DROP demands ❌ like Strait of Hormuz 🛳️🚢 CHOKEHOLD 💪🌍 on world OIL 🛢️💰 1/5 supply! Khamenei 🧔☠️ funeral 🪦🕯️ after US-Israeli STRIKE 🧨🗡️ shows regime STRONG CORE 💪❤️ support despite protests 💥👥 crushed ruthlessly. Negotiators Steve Witkoff 🧔📋 Jared Kushner 👨‍💼💼 told 'I don't CARE 🖕🗣️ talk if you WANT 😩 but they're LYING GUYS 🤥🗣️ WASTING TIME ⏳💸!' Fragile TALKS 🗣️💔 on HOLD 🛑 while Iran MOURNS 🪦😢 but mediators say SETBACK 😣💥 atmosphere TENSE 😬💢. No BETTER OPTION than NEGOTIATIONS 🤝🍆 cuz US-Israeli regime SMASH 💥🪖 FAILED miserably. Iran 🟡 WON'T RELINQUISH 🛑🚫 Hormuz CONTROL 🛳️🔒 wants ASSETS 🏦💰 UNFROZEN OIL SALES 🛢️💵 ACKNOWLEDGED AUTHORITY 🧠👑. In RETURN 🔄🤝 Iran LIMITS URANIUM 💎☢️ UN INSPECTORS 🔍🕵️‍♂️ ACCOUNT 'NUCLEAR DUST' ☢️🧂. 24 HOURS ⏰💥 show HOW HARD 🤯💦 deal will BE but Trump 🍊👑 for ALL BLUSTER 🤡📢 has NO CHOICE but TALKS 🗣️🤝 or BUST 🛑💥!
